data.title: Wall Street Giant Charles Schwab to Offer Bitcoin and Ethereum Trading
data.description:
TL;DR Charles Schwab will offer spot trading for BTC and ETH directly from standard accounts, with no need for external exchanges or additional wallets. It plans to launch its own stablecoin after final approval of the GENIUS Act to boost liquidity and expand financial services. With $25 billion already exposed to crypto, it aims to. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/wall-street-giant-charles-schwab-to-offer-bitcoin-and-ethereum-trading/

data.title: Trump Asserts GENIUS Act Will Secure U.S. Leadership in Crypto Technology
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the GENIUS Act is designed to ensure the United States achieves global dominance in the field of cryptocurrency technology.

data.title: JPMorgan reveals global regulators favor tokenized bank deposits over stablecoins
data.description:
JPMorgan’s latest research indicates that international regulators are more inclined to support tokenized deposits, particularly those that preserve the existing structure and stability of fiat-based banking systems, The Block reported on July 18.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/jpmorgan-reveals-global-regulators-favor-tokenized-bank-deposits-over-stablecoins/

data.title: The Banks Are Up Against the Digital Asset Industry in a DC Policy Battle, and Crypto’s Been ‘Winning,’ Says Custodia Bank CEO
data.description:
The CEO of Custodia Bank, a US financial institution specializing in cryptocurrencies, says passing crypto legislation in the US has been a pitched battle between traditional banks and the digital asset industry. The House of Representatives this week passed the CLARITY Act, the GENIUS Act and the Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/18/the-banks-are-up-against-the-digital-asset-industry-in-a-dc-policy-battle-and-cryptos-been-winning-says-custodia-bank-ceo/

data.title: U.S. consumer sentiment hits 5-month high as inflation fears ease
data.description:
U. S. consumer sentiment climbed in early July to its strongest level in five months, as worries about inflation started to pull back, according to data from the University of Michigan released Friday. The preliminary sentiment index hit 61. 8, up from 60. 7 in June. While that’s a small bump, it’s the highest reading since February. Still, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-consumer-sentiment-hits-5-month-high/

data.title: Euler Finance and Brahma Introduce Swype.fun, a DeFi-Powered Credit Card on Base
data.description:
TL;DR Brahma launched Swype. fun, a card that allows payments at merchants using crypto as collateral without selling the assets. The integration with Euler and Base borrows USDC in real time against AAVE or Euler and settles payments without touching the investment. Users keep full control: they set collateral, limits, and spending; Brahma only connects with. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/euler-finance-and-brahma-introduce-swype-fun-a-defi-powered-credit-card-on-base/

data.title: El Salvador hasn’t bought Bitcoin since signing loan deal, IMF says
data.description:

data.title: Clarity Act Passes House: Cardano Eyes Commodity Status as New Crypto Rules Take Shape
data.description:
The Clarity Act has successfully passed through the House of Representatives, marking a significant development in the ongoing regulatory landscape for cryptocurrencies. As new rules and guidelines begin to take shape, Cardano is strategically positioning itself to pursue designation as a commodity, which could have substantial implications for its market status and regulatory framework. This legislative progress is expected to influence the future of digital assets and the overall cryptocurrency ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/clarity-act-passes-house-cardano-eyes-commodity-status-new-crypto-rules-take-shape/
